events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need evaluate scenario: crew used field method for conductor selection & sizing less tidy than preferred shop approach but still matches listed product instructions and project requirement. No local amendment or drawing note forbids it. Reference NEC 310, Table 310.16. Work stage in-progress. Need decision likely pass because field method acceptable if matches product instructions and project requirements, no prohibition. Risk low. Need fill fields. Need ensure no prose outside JSON. Need write to /app/answer.json? In final we provide JSON content. Since we are assistant, output JSON. Need include all fields. component_conditions none flagged -> empty list. percent_complete maybe 50? value 0. sound_source empty? Schema says component or source of sound when asked; not asked, maybe empty string. confidence 0.9. event_time 0, rate 0, order empty, workable empty. findings empty. actions maybe none. rationale brief. references NEC 310, Table 310.16. Ensure valid JSON.
